name: Draw Things Image Generation
description: Local AI image generation using Draw Things CLI on Apple Silicon. Supports SD, FLUX, and other models without API costs.
author: Andres Rovira

modelsDir.description: Optional override for models directory. Supports ~ for home directory.

outputDir.description: Directory to save generated images. Supports ~ for home directory.

highResSteps.description: Steps for img2img upscaling when generating SD 1.5 images at high resolution.

defaultSteps.description: Default sampling steps. Higher values = better quality but slower generation.

defaultCfg.description: Default CFG guidance scale. Higher values = stricter prompt adherence.
